modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help changing chart appearance in Excel.

full_description_text: User wants to modify chart visuals in Excel. Not sure how to do it. Looking for guidance on changing styles or formats.

description: User wants to modify chart visuals in Excel. Not sure how to do it. Looking for guidance on changing styles or formats.
